scripts.build: npm run build-grammar && npm run build-compiler
scripts.build-compiler: npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6-ast.s5 > /tmp/_s6_ast.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_ast.ts Stage6-ast.ts && npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6-lower.s5 > /tmp/_s6_lower.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_lower.ts Stage6-lower.ts && npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6-codegen.s5 > /tmp/_s6_codegen.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_codegen.ts Stage6-codegen.ts && npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6-macro-env.s5 > /tmp/_s6_macro_env.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_macro_env.ts Stage6-macro-env.ts && npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6-macro-expand.s5 > /tmp/_s6_macro_expand.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_macro_expand.ts Stage6-macro-expand.ts && npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6-scope-resolve.s5 > /tmp/_s6_scope_resolve.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_scope_resolve.ts Stage6-scope-resolve.ts && npx tsx ../stage5/index.ts Stage6.s5 > /tmp/_s6_main.ts && mv /tmp/_s6_main.ts ./index.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npx vitest run
